heading: Wulgulmerang East vs Wulgulmerang West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wulgulmerang East, Victoria and Wulgulmerang West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wulgulmerang West has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Wulgulmerang East (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wulgulmerang East or Wulgulmerang West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wulgulmerang East has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Wulgulmerang West scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wulgulmerang East scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Wulgulmerang West scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wulgulmerang East or Wulgulmerang West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wulgulmerang West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
